overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing a character riding a mechanical mount through a desert wasteland filled with ancient concrete ruins during golden hour. The camera follows the character as they navigate through the sandy terrain past spiky desert plants and crumbling structures toward distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wasteland with scattered concrete ruins

agents.ego_description: riding mechanical mount at high speed through desert toward distant ruins and red fortress structure

entered.detail: large red wooden fortress structure with tribal architecture visible in the distance
crumbling concrete walls and foundations partially buried in sand
rocky mountain peaks forming the backdrop of the desert landscape
tall spiky desert vegetation with reddish hues scattered across dunes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character riding a mechanical mount across sandy desert terrain during golden hour. Ancient concrete ruins line the left side while a distinctive red tribal fortress stands in the distance to the right. Sparse spiky vegetation dots the landscape as the mount gallops forward toward the mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between ancient concrete ruins

events.description: mount turns right to navigate through tight gap between concrete ruin walls

agents.ego_description: steering the mechanical mount through narrow passages between crumbling concrete structures

entered.detail: bright golden sun glare appearing ahead as the mount turns toward the light

segments.scene_description: The mount turns right and navigates through a narrow passage between ancient concrete ruins. The red fortress from the previous segment falls behind as the camera moves through tighter spaces. Spiky desert plants pass by closely on the left, and the setting sun becomes visible ahead, casting long shadows across the sand.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert with distant rock spires

events.description: exits narrow ruins into open desert with clear view of setting sun and distant spires

agents.ego_description: galloping across open sand toward distant rock spires and mountain range

entered.detail: tall thin rock formations and spires visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the ruins, the scene opens into a wide desert vista with the sun low on the horizon to the right. The mount continues galloping across the open sand toward mysterious rock spires visible in the distance. The mountain range shifts to the left side of the frame as the terrain stretches openly ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a ruined desert wasteland that transitions from a structured corridor of concrete into a vast, open vista. It begins with a character riding a mechanical mount across sandy terrain, passing ancient concrete ruins on the left and a distant red tribal fortress on the right. As the mount turns right, the scene shifts into a narrow passage where the fortress falls behind and the camera weaves through tighter spaces between ruins and spiky desert plants. The perspective then opens up as the mount emerges from the ruins, revealing a wide desert expanse with the low setting sun casting long shadows across the sand. Finally, the camera gallops toward distant rock spires as the mountain range shifts to the left, leaving the ruins behind for an open horizon.
